raw_consumer_statement:
I reported my American Express credit card as stolen XXXX/or compromised XXXX  instructed the company, on no fewer than XXXX separate occasions, that all transactions were unauthorized XXXX  that the account was XXXX be immediately frozen with all activity blocked, including recurring charges. 

American Express confirmed in writing that fraud protections were in place XXXX  that no further transactions would be authorized. 

Despite this, American Express continued XXXX  authorize XXXX  process transactions, including approximately {$1000.00} in charges after the account had been frozen XXXX  after I had been explicitly told that all activity was blocked. These transactions include, but are not limited to, XXXX XXXX XXXX Charging, XXXX, and a charge identified as Corporate Filings in the amount of approximately {$620.00}. 

After these unauthorized transactions were identified XXXX  disputed, American Express failed XXXX  take appropriate corrective action. Instead, the company claimed that there were XXXX active cards on the account, which directly contradicts prior representations that the account was restricted XXXX  secured. This confirms that American Express failed XXXX  properly secure the account after receiving actual notice of fraud. 

In addition, American Express has refused XXXX  properly process fraud claims despite repeated notice XXXX  supporting documentation. Representatives have failed XXXX  escalate the matter appropriately XXXX  have declined XXXX  treat these transactions as fraud, even though the company had actual knowledge that the account was compromised XXXX  that no transactions were authorized. 

At the time these charges were authorized, American Express had clear and repeated notice of fraud XXXX  explicit instructions XXXX  block all transactions. The continued authorization of charges under these circumstances demonstrates a failure XXXX  follow required fraud prevention procedures XXXX a failure XXXX  comply with federal consumer protection obligations. 

I am requesting the following : Immediate reversal of all unauthorized charges Removal of all related fees, interest, XXXX  penalties Written confirmation that I bear XXXX liability for these transactions Confirmation that no adverse credit reporting has occurred, or immediate correction if it has Written confirmation that the account has been fully secured XXXX  that no further unauthorized transactions can occur This matter has also been escalated directly XXXX  American Express XXXX leadership XXXX  legal counsel.
